name: BilgeAdam Software
message: BilgeAdam  operates as one of the subsidiaries of BilgeAdam IT Group, founded in 1997. The headquarters of the company, which includes the sts Research Center, subordinate to the Ministry of Industry and Technology, is located at 4 b3 Sarıyer, Istanbul, 34396, Turkey. The main areas of activity are IOT management, automation, communications, network and security. Leak includes their internal source codes and recent live screenshots of their works.
